# Cleaning Instructions

Acme Shop emphasizes the importance of proper care to maintain the longevity and appearance of its products. For fabric items, gentle detergent and cold water are recommended, preferably through hand washing, while electronic items should be cleaned with a dry microfiber cloth after being unplugged. Wooden and metal items can be cleaned with a damp cloth using mild soap, ensuring thorough drying to avoid rust. Acme Shop offers customer service support for any product care inquiries.

[Source: product_care.md#cleaning-instructions]
